basics.name: Vipul Kumar Singh
basics.title: Client Acquisition & Retention Expert | Product Management | AI & Agentic Systems | Operations & Sales Leader
basics.summary: Business operator with 8+ years of experience scaling revenue, managing supply chains, and leading business operations in an industrial products company. Currently responsible for sales, procurement strategy, plant operations, and legal recovery processes supporting ₹50Cr+ annual business operations. A professional tenure spanning eight years has culminated in the comprehensive oversight of critical corporate functions, encompassing sales, legal compliance, and the development of innovative products.

bullets: Lead sales and business operations supporting ₹50Cr+ annual revenue
Manage procurement strategy, vendor negotiations, and supply chain operations
Oversee plant operations and operational process improvements
Drive revenue growth through strategic sales initiatives
Coordinate with external law firms on 25+ legal recovery cases across multiple courts in India
Manage bad debt recovery processes and legal documentation
Implement operational improvements to support business scalability
Led sales strategy and business development activities
Built and maintained relationships with key clients and distributors
Identified market expansion opportunities
Worked closely with operations to align demand with supply
Coordinated development of new industrial products
Worked with suppliers and production teams for product manufacturing
Supported product sourcing and vendor alignment
Gathered customer insights to refine product offerings
Managed company cash flow operations
Handled billing processes and invoice management
Conducted payment follow-ups with clients
Monitored receivables and financial coordination
Assisted with financial records and accounting documentation
Supported billing and transaction tracking
Helped maintain financial data systems

achievements.context: Lead sales and business operations supporting ₹50Cr+ annual revenue
Coordinate with external law firms on 25+ legal recovery cases across multiple courts in India

projects.title: AI Agentic Project Submission
bullets: Problem Framing Document: Defines the persona, problem statement, and market research summary.
Pitch Deck: 5–8 slides covering problem, market, solution, architecture, and roadmap.
UX/Wireframes: Link to Figma/screenshot or the wireframes generated by AI design tools.
Frontend Prototype: A live link of Lovable/Vercel.
Backend Agent Workflow: Visual n8n workflow, plus a brief note on how the agent logic works.
Metrics & Roadmap Doc: 3–5 key success metrics and product roadmap.
Process & Decision Log: A specific document highlighting learnings, prompt iterations, and design choices.
5-Minute Video Pitch: A Loom/YouTube link combining slide pitch and live technical demo.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts - BA, Science, Technology and Society

certifications: Product Management & Agentic AI (Masai X IIT Patna)
